Name: Raptor Form
Reason: Personal Monk form state; noisy on party status rows.
Notes: Seen in solo debug as the only visible slot after other Monk statuses were hidden.

Name: Formless Fist
Reason: Monk personal form/rotation state. Useful to the Monk, not useful to other players.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it.

Name: Coeurl Form
Reason: Monk personal form state. Useful to the Monk, not useful to other players.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it.

Name: Opo-opo Form
Reason: Monk personal form state. Useful to the Monk, not useful to other players.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it.

Name: Perfect Balance
Reason: Monk personal form state. Useful to the Monk, not useful to other players.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it. Party-list UI can use alternate icons.

Name: Riddle of Fire
Reason: Monk personal damage burst/status. Useful to the Monk, not useful to other players.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it.

Name: Fire's Rumination
Reason: Monk personal follow-up/job-state status from Riddle of Fire. Useful to the Monk, not useful to other players.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it.

Name: Riddle of Wind
Reason: Monk personal burst/status. Useful to the Monk, not useful to other players.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it.

Name: Wind's Rumination
Reason: Monk personal follow-up/job-state status from Riddle of Wind. Useful to the Monk, not useful to other players.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it.

Name: Hunter's Instinct
Reason: Viper personal job-state/burst status. Useful to the Viper, not useful to other players.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it.

Name: Overheated
Reason: Personal Machinist burst state; not useful on other party members' status rows.
Notes: Always show if the local player has it.
